hero.title: Ristorante Pescheria Belvga
hero.subtitle: Fresh Mediterranean seafood on the shores of Lake Lugano

story.title: Our Story
story.description: For over three decades, we've been bringing the finest seafood from the Mediterranean to your plate. Our passion for fresh, sustainable ingredients and traditional Italian cooking creates an unforgettable dining experience.

cta.title: Ready for an Unforgettable Evening?
cta.description: Reserve your table and experience the finest seafood in Lugano.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.description: Discover our carefully curated selection of Mediterranean seafood dishes, prepared with the freshest ingredients.
menu.note: Please inform us of any allergies or dietary requirements.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Explore our dishes, restaurant, and the beautiful Lake Lugano views.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 1990, Ristorante Pescheria Belvga has been a cornerstone of fine seafood dining in Lugano. Our journey began with a simple vision: to bring the authentic flavors of the Mediterranean to the heart of Switzerland.
story.p2: Three generations later, we continue to honor this tradition while embracing innovation. Every dish tells a story of our family's passion for the sea and commitment to excellence.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.p1: We believe that great food starts with great ingredients. That's why we work directly with local fishermen and sustainable suppliers to source the freshest seafood every day.
philosophy.p2: Our kitchen combines time-honored Italian recipes with modern techniques, creating dishes that are both authentic and exciting.

chef.title: Meet Our Chef
chef.name: Chef Marco Belvga
chef.bio: With over 25 years of experience in Michelin-starred kitchens across Italy and Switzerland, Chef Marco brings his expertise and passion to every plate. His creations celebrate the natural flavors of the sea while pushing culinary boundaries.

location.title: Our Location
location.description: Nestled on the shores of Lake Lugano, our restaurant offers breathtaking views of the water and surrounding mountains. The warm, elegant interior creates the perfect setting for any occasion.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We'd love to hear from you. Get in touch or visit us.

reserve.title: Reserve a Table
reserve.description: Book your unforgettable dining experience at Ristorante Pescheria Belvga.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number

confirmation.subtitle: Thank you for your reservation

confirmation.contactNote: Need to change or cancel? Please call us at +41 91 XXX XX XX

largeParty.note: For parties larger than 8 guests, please call us directly

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Ristorante Pescheria Belvga, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as name, email, phone number, and reservation details when you book a table with us.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use your information to process reservations, send confirmation emails, and improve our services. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at info@belvga.ch for any requests.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies to ensure the website functions properly. No tracking cookies are used without your consent.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any privacy-related questions, please contact us at info@belvga.ch
